title: The Tuft Of Kelp
content:
All dripping in tangles green,
    Cast up by a lonely sea
    If purer for that, O Weed,
    Bitterer, too, are ye?
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Herman Melville delivers a powerful performance in "The Tuft Of Kelp"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
